Business: Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Limited, operates as a non-banking finance company in India. The company operates through Vehicle Finance, Loan Against Property, Home Loans, and Other Loans segments. It offers loans for commercial vehicles, passenger vehicles, two- and three- wheelers, and tractors, as well as construction equipment. T…

  Current: 16.59  (+0.85% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows
